\tzpentry{ID3526}{Wavefunction Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3526 introduces Wavefunction Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \psi(r, \theta) = A \, r^n e^{-\frac{r^2}{2\sigma^2}} e^{i \ell \theta} \]
